output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?givenNameLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q14916067 wdt:P735 wd:Q19803504 .
  wd:Q19803504 rdfs:label ?givenNameLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?givenNameLabel) = "en")
}

- G. (wd:Q19803504), also known as "G":
  - given name with this initial. Full name undetermined, not generally used or not determinable
  - is instance of given name
  - is instance of initials instead of given names

Using properties:
- given name (wd:P735 as wdt), also known as "Christian name", "first name", "firstname", "forename", "middle name", etc.:
  - first name or another given name of this person; values used with the property should not link disambiguations nor family names

  wd:Q14916067 wdt:P735 wd:Q19803504 .

}
